form.formComment: Last start finished 5th over 390m at this track beaten 4 lengths (22.83) behind Molly Mckayla in a Grade 5 on April 9. Racing well and has to be included.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th over 435m at Sale beaten 4.5 lengths (24.93) behind Pretty Follie in a Grade 5 on April 12. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

form.formComment: Ran a better race when third behind Power Affect at this track last start over 390m (22.56). Good beginner who shouldn't be far away in the run.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, Last start finished seventh over 390m at this track, beaten 9 lengths. Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.
